key_risks: June 5 May payrolls surprise could trigger sharp rate-driven rotation out of high-beta growth/tech.
Concentrated AI/tech exposure means a single-week factor reversal or megacap drawdown hits the whole book.
Sticky CPI (3.8% YoY) and hot PPI could revive rate fears and compress high-multiple growth names.

portfolio.rationale: Strong momentum, 25% QoQ global chip sales growth, AI capex tailwind likely to persist into exit close.
Tech sector leading with strong breadth; low VIX and soft inflation support growth.
Momentum factor leading with persistent trend, benign macro backdrop favors continuation.
Software prices rising sharply; strong recent momentum with room to run after lagging.
Benchmark anchor to limit tracking error given jobs report risk on June 5.

portfolio_rationale: Tilt into the leading AI/tech/momentum complex which has firm fundamental support (chip sales, software pricing, low vol) while anchoring partly to SP500 to manage benchmark-relative risk around the June 5 payrolls print.
rationale_summary: Overweight semis, tech, software and momentum given AI capex strength and benign macro; SP500 anchor limits downside vs benchmark.
